title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
